title: Pattaya、Chon Buri — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Pattaya、Chon Buriの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

PattayaはChon Buriにある人口500,000の都市です。A coastal city on the Gulf of Thailand known for its beaches, nightlife, and large expat retirement community with affordable living costs.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
